name: Ardentec Corporation
summary: Ardentec Corporation provides semiconductor testing solutions in memory, logic, and mixed-signal ICs (integrated circuits) to integrated device manufacturers, pure play wafer foundry companies, and fabless design companies. The company offers testing services comprising engineering services before mass production, such as test engineering consultations and recommendations for design, test plan and test program development, test program cross-platform conversion, complete product characterization, and laser program development and analysis; and mass production engineering services consisting of suggestions and services of test time reduction, yield analysis and enhancement, laser repair yield analysis and improvement, timely retrieval of test data on secured Internet, test program management system, test data analysis and periodical report provision, and outlier management services, as well as stable testing services. It also provides probe card design and consultant, outsourced manufacturing, and maintenance and system management for repair record and tracking services; wafer level chip scale packaging backend process services; and wafer probing platforms. In addition, the company offers certification, and quality system and assurance structure services, as well as quality, information security, and hazardous substance free policy services; and IT policy, IT service architecture, and testing information services. Further, it provides testing and assembly services; electronic ICs, diodes, transistors, and semiconductor devices; IC devices testing and trimming services; ICs, module, and component testing services; and manufactures electronic components. Additionally, the company offers burn in testing of wafer types; wafer testing for LCD driver ICs and analog ICs; and wafer and final testing of radio frequency ICs. It operates in the United States, Taiwan, Singapore, Korea, China, and internationally. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
